[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › aceita backblaze_key_cpf + backblaze_url_cpf no lugar de arquivo (PF)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/backblaze_key_cpf/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m

[2m    [31m[1m>[22m[2m[39m[90m 403 |[39m     expect(src)[33m.[39mtoMatch([35m/backblaze_key_cpf/[39m)[33m;[39m[22m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › aceita backblaze_key_cnpj + backblaze_url_cnpj (PJ)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/backblaze_key_cnpj/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › aceita backblaze_key_cpf_responsavel + backblaze_url_cpf_responsavel (PJ)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/backblaze_key_cpf_responsavel/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › valida que backblaze_url_cpf começa com https:// (rejeita URLs inválidas)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/bbUrlCpf.*startsWith.*'https:\/\/'/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Telefone inválido (DDD + número)',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'telefone',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m
    [31m    let cpf: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cnpj: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let razaoSocial: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cpfResponsavel: string | null = null;···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m
    [31m      cpf = limparNumeros((formData.get('cpf') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpf)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      cnpj = limparNumeros((formData.get('cnpj') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCNPJ(cnpj)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CNPJ inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial = sanitizarString(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('razao_social') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!razaoSocial || razaoSocial.length < 3) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m

    [31m          },·[39m

    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      cpfResponsavel = limparNumeros(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('cpf_responsavel') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpfResponsavel)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF do responsável inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf_responsavel',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m
    [31m    const emailExists = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE email = $1 AND status NOT IN ('rejeitado')`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m

    [31m          code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Verificar duplicata também na tabela de representantes oficiais·[39m
    [31m    const emailExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE email = $1`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m

    [31m        [cnpj]·[39m

    [31m      await processarDocumentosUpload(formData, tipoPessoa, identificador);·[39m
    [31m    if (docError) return docError;···[39m
    [31m    // 8. Inserir no banco·[39m

    [31m    const userAgent = request.headers.get('user-agent') ?? '';···[39m
    [31m    const insertResult = await query<{ id: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `INSERT INTO representantes_cadastro_leads (·[39m

    [31m    // 9. Notificar usuários comercial sobre novo cadastro de representante·[39m

    [31m          `INSERT INTO notificacoes (tipo, destinatario_id, destinatario_tipo, titulo, mensagem, link_acao, created_at)·[39m
    [31m           VALUES ${comercialUsers.rows.map((_, idx) => `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6}, NOW())`).join(', ')}`,·[39m
    [31m          notifParams·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      console.log(·[39m

    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    } catch (notifErr) {·[39m
    [31m      // Falha na notificação não deve quebrar o cadastro·[39m

    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 10. Retornar sucesso·[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: leadId,·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m        message:·[39m
    [31m          'Cadastro recebido com sucesso! Seus documentos serão analisados e você receberá um retorno em breve.',·[39m
    [31m      },·[39m
    [31m      { status: 201, headers: getCorsHeaders(origin) }·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  } catch (error) {·[39m
    [31m    console.error('[CADASTRO-REP] Erro no cadastro:', error);···[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m
    [31m        success: false,·[39m

    [31m      },·[39m
    [31m      { status: 500, headers: getCorsHeaders(origin) }·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m}·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › valida que backblaze_url_cnpj começa com https://[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/bbUrlCnpj.*startsWith.*'https:\/\/'/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Telefone inválido (DDD + número)',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'telefone',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m
    [31m    let cpf: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cnpj: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let razaoSocial: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cpfResponsavel: string | null = null;···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m
    [31m      cpf = limparNumeros((formData.get('cpf') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpf)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      cnpj = limparNumeros((formData.get('cnpj') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCNPJ(cnpj)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CNPJ inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial = sanitizarString(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('razao_social') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!razaoSocial || razaoSocial.length < 3) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Razão social obrigatória para PJ',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'razao_social',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      cpfResponsavel = limparNumeros(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('cpf_responsavel') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpfResponsavel)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF do responsável inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf_responsavel',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m
    [31m    const emailExists = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE email = $1 AND status NOT IN ('rejeitado')`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

    [31m          code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Verificar duplicata também na tabela de representantes oficiais·[39m
    [31m    const emailExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE email = $1`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m

    [31m          error: 'Este e-mail já está cadastrado como representante',·[39m

    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf' && cpf) {·[39m

    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cpfExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CPF já possui um cadastro em análise',·[39m

    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      const cpfExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE cpf = $1`,·[39m
    [31m        [cpf]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cpfExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CPF já está cadastrado como representante',·[39m

    [31m            code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m

    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pj' && cnpj) {·[39m

    [31m        [cnpj]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cnpjExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m

    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CNPJ já possui um cadastro em análise',·[39m

    [31m            code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m

    [31m      const cnpjExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE cnpj = $1`,·[39m
    [31m        [cnpj]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cnpjExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CNPJ já está cadastrado como representante',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 7. Validar e processar arquivos·[39m
    [31m    const identificador = tipoPessoa === 'pf' ? cpf! : cnpj!;·[39m
    [31m    const { docs: docsUpload, error: docError } =·[39m
    [31m      await processarDocumentosUpload(formData, tipoPessoa, identificador);·[39m
    [31m    if (docError) return docError;···[39m
    [31m    // 8. Inserir no banco·[39m
    [31m    const docCpfData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cpf');·[39m
    [31m    const docCnpjData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cnpj');·[39m
    [31m    const docCpfRespData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cpf_responsavel');···[39m
    [31m    const userAgent = request.headers.get('user-agent') ?? '';···[39m
    [31m    const insertResult = await query<{ id: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `INSERT INTO representantes_cadastro_leads (·[39m
    [31m        tipo_pessoa, nome, email, telefone,·[39m
    [31m        cpf, cnpj, razao_social, cpf_responsavel,·[39m
    [31m        doc_cpf_filename, doc_cpf_key, doc_cpf_url,·[39m
    [31m        doc_cnpj_filename, doc_cnpj_key, doc_cnpj_url,·[39m

    [31m      ) VALUES (·[39m
    [31m        $1, $2, $3, $4,·[39m
    [31m        $5, $6, $7, $8,·[39m

    [31m        $18, $19·[39m

    [31m      [·[39m
    [31m        tipoPessoa,·[39m
    [31m        nome,·[39m
    [31m        email,·[39m
    [31m        telefone,·[39m
    [31m        cpf,·[39m
    [31m        cnpj,·[39m
    [31m        razaoSocial,·[39m
    [31m        cpfResponsavel,·[39m
    [31m        docCpfData?.filename ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCpfData?.key ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCpfData?.url ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCnpjData?.filename ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCnpjData?.key ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCnpjData?.url ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        docCpfRespData?.filename ?? null,·[39m

    [31m        docCpfRespData?.url ?? null,·[39m
    [31m        ip,·[39m
    [31m        userAgent,·[39m
    [31m      ]·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    const leadId = insertResult.rows[0]?.id;···[39m
    [31m    console.log(·[39m
    [31m      `[CADASTRO-REP] Novo lead criado: ${leadId} — ${tipoPessoa.toUpperCase()} — ${nome} — ${email}`·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    // 9. Notificar usuários comercial sobre novo cadastro de representante·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const comercialUsers = await query<{ id: number; nome: string }>(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id, nome FROM usuarios WHERE tipo_usuario = 'comercial' AND ativo = true`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (comercialUsers.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars·[39m
    [31m        const _notifValues = comercialUsers.rows·[39m
    [31m          .map(·[39m
    [31m            (_, idx) =>·[39m
    [31m              `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6})`·[39m
    [31m          )·[39m
    [31m          .join(', ');·[39m
    [31m        const notifParams = comercialUsers.rows.flatMap((u) => [·[39m
    [31m          'novo_cadastro_representante',·[39m
    [31m          u.id,·[39m
    [31m          'comercial',·[39m
    [31m          'Novo cadastro de representante',·[39m
    [31m          `${tipoPessoa === 'pf' ? nome : (razaoSocial ?? nome)} solicitou cadastro como representante. Clique para analisar.`,·[39m
    [31m          `/comercial/representantes/cadastros/${leadId}`,·[39m
    [31m        ]);·[39m
    [31m        await query(·[39m
    [31m          `INSERT INTO notificacoes (tipo, destinatario_id, destinatario_tipo, titulo, mensagem, link_acao, created_at)·[39m
    [31m           VALUES ${comercialUsers.rows.map((_, idx) => `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6}, NOW())`).join(', ')}`,·[39m
    [31m          notifParams·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      console.log(·[39m
    [31m        `[NOTIF-COMERCIAL] ${comercialUsers.rows.length} notificação(ões) criada(s) para lead ${leadId}`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    } catch (notifErr) {·[39m
    [31m      // Falha na notificação não deve quebrar o cadastro·[39m
    [31m      console.error('[NOTIF-COMERCIAL] Erro ao criar notificações:', notifErr);·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 10. Retornar sucesso·[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: leadId,·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m        message:·[39m
    [31m          'Cadastro recebido com sucesso! Seus documentos serão analisados e você receberá um retorno em breve.',·[39m
    [31m      },·[39m
    [31m      { status: 201, headers: getCorsHeaders(origin) }·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  } catch (error) {·[39m
    [31m    console.error('[CADASTRO-REP] Erro no cadastro:', error);···[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m

    [31m      {·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › valida que backblaze_url_cpf_responsavel começa com https://[39m[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/bbUrlCpfResp.*startsWith.*'https:\/\/'/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m

    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m

    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m

    [31m          'comercial',·[39m
    [31m          'Novo cadastro de representante',·[39m
    [31m          `${tipoPessoa === 'pf' ? nome : (razaoSocial ?? nome)} solicitou cadastro como representante. Clique para analisar.`,·[39m
    [31m          `/comercial/representantes/cadastros/${leadId}`,·[39m
    [31m        ]);·[39m
    [31m        await query(·[39m
    [31m          `INSERT INTO notificacoes (tipo, destinatario_id, destinatario_tipo, titulo, mensagem, link_acao, created_at)·[39m
    [31m           VALUES ${comercialUsers.rows.map((_, idx) => `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6}, NOW())`).join(', ')}`,·[39m
    [31m          notifParams·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      console.log(·[39m
    [31m        `[NOTIF-COMERCIAL] ${comercialUsers.rows.length} notificação(ões) criada(s) para lead ${leadId}`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m

    [31m      // Falha na notificação não deve quebrar o cadastro·[39m

    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 10. Retornar sucesso·[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › só faz upload de arquivo se NÃO houver chave Backblaze (else branch)[39m[22m

    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m

    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m

    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m
    [31m    let cpf: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cnpj: string | null = null;·[39m

    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m

    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m

    [31m        ip,·[39m
    [31m        userAgent,·[39m
    [31m      ]·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    const leadId = insertResult.rows[0]?.id;···[39m
    [31m    console.log(·[39m
    [31m      `[CADASTRO-REP] Novo lead criado: ${leadId} — ${tipoPessoa.toUpperCase()} — ${nome} — ${email}`·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    // 9. Notificar usuários comercial sobre novo cadastro de representante·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const comercialUsers = await query<{ id: number; nome: string }>(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id, nome FROM usuarios WHERE tipo_usuario = 'comercial' AND ativo = true`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (comercialUsers.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars·[39m
    [31m        const _notifValues = comercialUsers.rows·[39m
    [31m          .map(·[39m
    [31m            (_, idx) =>·[39m
    [31m              `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6})`·[39m
    [31m          )·[39m
    [31m          .join(', ');·[39m
    [31m        const notifParams = comercialUsers.rows.flatMap((u) => [·[39m
    [31m          'novo_cadastro_representante',·[39m
    [31m          u.id,·[39m
    [31m          'comercial',·[39m

    [31m          `/comercial/representantes/cadastros/${leadId}`,·[39m
    [31m        ]);·[39m
    [31m        await query(·[39m
    [31m          `INSERT INTO notificacoes (tipo, destinatario_id, destinatario_tipo, titulo, mensagem, link_acao, created_at)·[39m
    [31m           VALUES ${comercialUsers.rows.map((_, idx) => `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6}, NOW())`).join(', ')}`,·[39m
    [31m          notifParams·[39m

    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    } catch (notifErr) {·[39m
    [31m      // Falha na notificação não deve quebrar o cadastro·[39m

    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 10. Retornar sucesso·[39m
    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: leadId,·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m

    [31m      },·[39m

    [31m    );·[39m

    [31m    const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      {·[39m

    [31m        code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR',·[39m
    [31m      },·[39m
    [31m      { status: 500, headers: getCorsHeaders(origin) }·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m}·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › passa tipoPessoa="pf" como 5o arg no upload PF[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/uploadDocumentoRepresentante[\s\S]*?'cpf'[\s\S]*?'pf'/m[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m

    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m

    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m

    [31m      if (!validarCNPJ(cnpj)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m

    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m

    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial = sanitizarString(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('razao_social') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m

    [31m      cpfResponsavel = limparNumeros(·[39m

    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpfResponsavel)) {·[39m

    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m
    [31m    const emailExists = await query(·[39m
