[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › passa tipoPessoa="pj" como 5o arg no upload CNPJ (PJ)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/uploadDocumentoRepresentante[\s\S]*?'cnpj'[\s\S]*?'pj'/m[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Telefone inválido (DDD + número)',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'telefone',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m
    [31m    let cpf: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cnpj: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let razaoSocial: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cpfResponsavel: string | null = null;···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m
    [31m      cpf = limparNumeros((formData.get('cpf') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpf)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      cnpj = limparNumeros((formData.get('cnpj') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCNPJ(cnpj)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CNPJ inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial = sanitizarString(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('razao_social') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!razaoSocial || razaoSocial.length < 3) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m

    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      cpfResponsavel = limparNumeros(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('cpf_responsavel') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpfResponsavel)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m

    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m
    [31m    const emailExists = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE email = $1 AND status NOT IN ('rejeitado')`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m

    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m

    [31m      if (cpfExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m

    [31m        [cpf]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cpfExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m

    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pj' && cnpj) {·[39m
    [31m      const cnpjExists = await query(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE cnpj = $1 AND status NOT IN ('rejeitado')`,·[39m
    [31m        [cnpj]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cnpjExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CNPJ já possui um cadastro em análise',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      const cnpjExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE cnpj = $1`,·[39m
    [31m        [cnpj]·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (cnpjExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Este CNPJ já está cadastrado como representante',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 7. Validar e processar arquivos·[39m
    [31m    const identificador = tipoPessoa === 'pf' ? cpf! : cnpj!;·[39m
    [31m    const { docs: docsUpload, error: docError } =·[39m
    [31m      await processarDocumentosUpload(formData, tipoPessoa, identificador);·[39m
    [31m    if (docError) return docError;···[39m
    [31m    // 8. Inserir no banco·[39m
    [31m    const docCpfData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cpf');·[39m
    [31m    const docCnpjData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cnpj');·[39m
    [31m    const docCpfRespData = docsUpload.find((d) => d.tipo === 'cpf_responsavel');···[39m
    [31m    const userAgent = request.headers.get('user-agent') ?? '';···[39m
    [31m    const insertResult = await query<{ id: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `INSERT INTO representantes_cadastro_leads (·[39m
    [31m        tipo_pessoa, nome, email, telefone,·[39m
    [31m        cpf, cnpj, razao_social, cpf_responsavel,·[39m
    [31m        doc_cpf_filename, doc_cpf_key, doc_cpf_url,·[39m

    [31m        $1, $2, $3, $4,·[39m

    [31m        $18, $19·[39m

    [31m      [·[39m
    [31m        tipoPessoa,·[39m
    [31m        nome,·[39m
    [31m        email,·[39m
    [31m        telefone,·[39m
    [31m        cpf,·[39m

    [31m        ip,·[39m
    [31m        userAgent,·[39m
    [31m      ]·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    const leadId = insertResult.rows[0]?.id;···[39m
    [31m    console.log(·[39m
    [31m      `[CADASTRO-REP] Novo lead criado: ${leadId} — ${tipoPessoa.toUpperCase()} — ${nome} — ${email}`·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    // 9. Notificar usuários comercial sobre novo cadastro de representante·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const comercialUsers = await query<{ id: number; nome: string }>(·[39m
    [31m        `SELECT id, nome FROM usuarios WHERE tipo_usuario = 'comercial' AND ativo = true`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m

    [31m        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars·[39m
    [31m        const _notifValues = comercialUsers.rows·[39m
    [31m          .map(·[39m
    [31m            (_, idx) =>·[39m
    [31m              `($${idx * 6 + 1}, $${idx * 6 + 2}, $${idx * 6 + 3}, $${idx * 6 + 4}, $${idx * 6 + 5}, $${idx * 6 + 6})`·[39m
    [31m          )·[39m
    [31m          .join(', ');·[39m
    [31m        const notifParams = comercialUsers.rows.flatMap((u) => [·[39m
    [31m          'novo_cadastro_representante',·[39m
    [31m          u.id,·[39m
    [31m          'comercial',·[39m

    [31m          `/comercial/representantes/cadastros/${leadId}`,·[39m
    [31m        ]);·[39m

    [31m          `INSERT INTO notificacoes (tipo, destinatario_id, destinatario_tipo, titulo, mensagem, link_acao, created_at)·[39m

    [31m      );·[39m

    [31m      { status: 500, headers: getCorsHeaders(origin) }·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m}·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m3. Rota pública — estrutura e validadores embutidos › passa tipoPessoa="pj" como 5o arg no upload CPF responsavel (PJ)[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/uploadDocumentoRepresentante[\s\S]*?'cpf_responsavel'[\s\S]*?'pj'/m[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/public/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rota PÚBLICA — recebe cadastro de representante vindo da landing page.·[39m
    [31m * Aceita multipart/form-data com dados pessoais + upload de documentos.·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * PF: arquivo de CPF obrigatório·[39m
    [31m * PJ: cartão CNPJ + CPF do responsável obrigatórios·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Rate limit: 5 cadastros/hora por IP·[39m
    [31m * Honeypot: campo \"website\" deve estar vazio (anti-bot)·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// CORS — permite requisições da landing page (qwork.app.br) e do próprio app·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [·[39m
    [31m  'https://www.qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  'https://qwork.app.br',·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL,·[39m
    [31m  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL,·[39m
    [31m].filter(Boolean) as string[];···[39m
    [31mfunction getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): HeadersInit {·[39m
    [31m  const allowed =·[39m
    [31m    origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin) ? origin : ALLOWED_ORIGINS[0];·[39m
    [31m  return {·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': allowed,·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',·[39m
    [31m    'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400',·[39m
    [31m  };·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m/** Preflight OPTIONS para CORS */·[39m
    [31mexport function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {·[39m
    [31m  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');·[39m
    [31m  return new NextResponse(null, {·[39m
    [31m    status: 204,·[39m
    [31m    headers: getCorsHeaders(origin),·[39m
    [31m  });·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  validarCPF,·[39m
    [31m  validarCNPJ,·[39m
    [31m  validarEmail,·[39m
    [31m  sanitizarString,·[39m
    [31m  limparNumeros,·[39m
    [31m  processarDocumentosUpload,·[39m
    [31m} from './helpers';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31m// Rate limit em memória (por IP, janela de 1h)·[39m
    [31m// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------·[39m
    [31mconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 5;·[39m
    [31mconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hora···[39m
    [31mfunction checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {·[39m
    [31m  const now = Date.now();·[39m
    [31m  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);···[39m
    [31m  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {·[39m
    [31m    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });·[39m
    [31m    return true;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {·[39m
    [31m    return false;·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  entry.count++;·[39m
    [31m  return true;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // 1. Rate limit por IP·[39m
    [31m    const ip =·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||·[39m
    [31m      request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||·[39m
    [31m      'unknown';···[39m
    [31m    if (!checkRateLimit(ip)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde 1 hora antes de tentar novamente.',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'RATE_LIMIT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 429 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 2. Parsear FormData·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await request.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Envie os dados como multipart/form-data',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'INVALID_FORMAT',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 3. Honeypot check·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = (formData.get('website') as string) ?? '';·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detectado — retorna sucesso falso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m        success: true,·[39m
    [31m        id: 'ok',·[39m
    [31m        status: 'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 4. Extrair e validar campos comuns·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = (formData.get('tipo_pessoa') as string)?.toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa !== 'pf' && tipoPessoa !== 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'tipo_pessoa deve ser PF ou PJ',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'tipo_pessoa',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const nome = sanitizarString((formData.get('nome') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (!nome || nome.length < 3 || nome.length > 200) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Nome deve ter entre 3 e 200 caracteres',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'nome',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const email = ((formData.get('email') as string) ?? '')·[39m
    [31m      .trim()·[39m
    [31m      .toLowerCase();·[39m
    [31m    if (!validarEmail(email)) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'E-mail inválido',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const telefone = limparNumeros((formData.get('telefone') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m    if (telefone.length < 10 || telefone.length > 11) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Telefone inválido (DDD + número)',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'telefone',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 5. Validar campos específicos por tipo de pessoa·[39m
    [31m    let cpf: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cnpj: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let razaoSocial: string | null = null;·[39m
    [31m    let cpfResponsavel: string | null = null;···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf') {·[39m
    [31m      cpf = limparNumeros((formData.get('cpf') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpf)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      cnpj = limparNumeros((formData.get('cnpj') as string) ?? '');·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCNPJ(cnpj)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CNPJ inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cnpj',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial = sanitizarString(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('razao_social') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!razaoSocial || razaoSocial.length < 3) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'Razão social obrigatória para PJ',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'razao_social',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      cpfResponsavel = limparNumeros(·[39m
    [31m        (formData.get('cpf_responsavel') as string) ?? ''·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      if (!validarCPF(cpfResponsavel)) {·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          {·[39m
    [31m            success: false,·[39m
    [31m            error: 'CPF do responsável inválido',·[39m
    [31m            field: 'cpf_responsavel',·[39m
    [31m            code: 'VALIDATION',·[39m
    [31m          },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 400 }·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // 6. Verificar duplicatas no banco (apenas leads não rejeitados)·[39m
    [31m    const emailExists = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE email = $1 AND status NOT IN ('rejeitado')`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExists.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m
    [31m          error: 'Este e-mail já possui um cadastro em análise',·[39m
    [31m          field: 'email',·[39m
    [31m          code: 'DUPLICATE',·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Verificar duplicata também na tabela de representantes oficiais·[39m
    [31m    const emailExistsRep = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT id FROM representantes WHERE email = $1`,·[39m
    [31m      [email]·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    if (emailExistsRep.rows.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          success: false,·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m4. Rotas admin /api/admin/representantes-leads/* › rota GET lista — conteúdo › usa requireRole("admin")[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/requireRole\s*\(\s*['"]admin['"]/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * GET /api/admin/representantes-leads·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Lista cadastros leads de representantes (da landing page) para revisão.·[39m
    [31m * Apenas admin.·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';·[39m
    [31mimport { requireRole } from '@/lib/session';·[39m
    [31mimport { verificarCpfEmUso } from '@/lib/cpf-conflict';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31mexport async function GET(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    const session = await requireRole('comercial', false);·[39m
    [31m    void session;···[39m
    [31m    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);·[39m
    [31m    const status = searchParams.get('status') ?? undefined;·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = searchParams.get('tipo_pessoa') ?? undefined;·[39m
    [31m    const busca = searchParams.get('busca') ?? undefined;·[39m
    [31m    const page = Math.max(1, parseInt(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));·[39m
    [31m    const limit = 30;·[39m
    [31m    const offset = (page - 1) * limit;···[39m
    [31m    const wheres: string[] = [];·[39m
    [31m    const params: unknown[] = [];·[39m
    [31m    let i = 1;···[39m
    [31m    const statusValidos = [·[39m
    [31m      'pendente_verificacao',·[39m
    [31m      'verificado',·[39m
    [31m      'rejeitado',·[39m
    [31m      'convertido',·[39m
    [31m    ];·[39m
    [31m    if (status && statusValidos.includes(status)) {·[39m
    [31m      wheres.push(`l.status = $${i++}`);·[39m
    [31m      params.push(status);·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === 'pf' || tipoPessoa === 'pj') {·[39m
    [31m      wheres.push(`l.tipo_pessoa = $${i++}`);·[39m
    [31m      params.push(tipoPessoa);·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    if (busca?.trim()) {·[39m
    [31m      wheres.push(·[39m
    [31m        `(l.nome ILIKE $${i} OR l.email ILIKE $${i} OR l.cpf ILIKE $${i} OR l.cnpj ILIKE $${i})`·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m      params.push(`%${busca.trim()}%`);·[39m
    [31m      i++;·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    const where = wheres.length ? `WHERE ${wheres.join(' AND ')}` : '';···[39m
    [31m    const countResult = await query<{ total: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM representantes_cadastro_leads l ${where}`,·[39m
    [31m      params·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    const total = parseInt(countResult.rows[0]?.total ?? '0', 10);···[39m
    [31m    params.push(limit, offset);·[39m
    [31m    const rows = await query(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT·[39m
    [31m         l.id, l.tipo_pessoa, l.nome, l.email, l.telefone,·[39m
    [31m         l.cpf, l.cnpj, l.razao_social, l.cpf_responsavel,·[39m
    [31m         l.doc_cpf_filename, l.doc_cpf_key, l.doc_cpf_url,·[39m
    [31m         l.doc_cnpj_filename, l.doc_cnpj_key, l.doc_cnpj_url,·[39m
    [31m         l.doc_cpf_resp_filename, l.doc_cpf_resp_key, l.doc_cpf_resp_url,·[39m
    [31m         l.status, l.motivo_rejeicao,·[39m
    [31m         l.ip_origem, l.criado_em, l.verificado_em, l.convertido_em,·[39m
    [31m         l.representante_id·[39m
    [31m       FROM representantes_cadastro_leads l·[39m
    [31m       ${where}·[39m
    [31m       ORDER BY·[39m
    [31m         CASE l.status·[39m
    [31m           WHEN 'pendente_verificacao' THEN 0·[39m
    [31m           WHEN 'verificado' THEN 1·[39m
    [31m           WHEN 'convertido' THEN 2·[39m
    [31m           ELSE 3·[39m
    [31m         END,·[39m
    [31m         l.criado_em DESC·[39m
    [31m       LIMIT $${i} OFFSET $${i + 1}`,·[39m
    [31m      params·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    // Contar pendentes (para badge independente dos filtros)·[39m
    [31m    const pendentesResult = await query<{ cnt: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE status = 'pendente_verificacao'`·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m    const pendentes = parseInt(pendentesResult.rows[0]?.cnt ?? '0', 10);···[39m
    [31m    // Enriquecer leads PF com verificação de conflito CPF cross-table·[39m
    [31m    const leadsEnriquecidos = await Promise.all(·[39m
    [31m      rows.rows.map(async (lead: Record<string, unknown>) => {·[39m
    [31m        if (·[39m
    [31m          lead.tipo_pessoa === 'pf' &&·[39m
    [31m          lead.cpf &&·[39m
    [31m          lead.status === 'verificado'·[39m
    [31m        ) {·[39m
    [31m          const conflicts = await verificarCpfEmUso(String(lead.cpf));·[39m
    [31m          if (conflicts.length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m            return { ...lead, cpf_conflict: conflicts[0] };·[39m
    [31m          }·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m        return { ...lead, cpf_conflict: null };·[39m
    [31m      })·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json({·[39m
    [31m      leads: leadsEnriquecidos,·[39m
    [31m      total,·[39m
    [31m      pendentes,·[39m
    [31m      page,·[39m
    [31m      limit,·[39m
    [31m    });·[39m
    [31m  } catch (err: unknown) {·[39m
    [31m    const e = err as Error;·[39m
    [31m    if (e.message === 'Não autenticado')·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Não autenticado' }, { status: 401 });·[39m
    [31m    if (e.message === 'Sem permissão')·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Sem permissão' }, { status: 403 });·[39m
    [31m    console.error('[GET /api/admin/representantes-leads]', e);·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Erro interno' }, { status: 500 });·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31m"[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m4. Rotas admin /api/admin/representantes-leads/* › rota POST aprovar — conteúdo › usa requireRole("admin")[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/requireRole\s*\(\s*['"]admin['"]/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"/**·[39m
    [31m * POST /api/admin/representantes-leads/[id]/aprovar·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Admin aprova documentação de um lead: status → 'verificado'·[39m
    [31m */·[39m
    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';·[39m
    [31mimport { query } from '@/lib/db';·[39m
    [31mimport { requireRole } from '@/lib/session';···[39m
    [31mexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(·[39m
    [31m  _request: NextRequest,·[39m
    [31m  { params }: { params: { id: string } }·[39m
    [31m): Promise<NextResponse> {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    const session = await requireRole('comercial', false);·[39m
    [31m    const leadId = params.id;···[39m
    [31m    if (!leadId) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'ID obrigatório' }, { status: 400 });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Verificar que lead existe e está em status pendente·[39m
    [31m    const current = await query<{ status: string }>(·[39m
    [31m      `SELECT status FROM representantes_cadastro_leads WHERE id = $1`,·[39m
    [31m      [leadId]·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m
    [31m    if (current.rows.length === 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        { error: 'Lead não encontrado' },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 404 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    if (current.rows[0].status !== 'pendente_verificacao') {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        {·[39m
    [31m          error: `Lead não pode ser aprovado — status atual: ${current.rows[0].status}`,·[39m
    [31m        },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 409 }·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Aprovar·[39m
    [31m    await query(·[39m
    [31m      `UPDATE representantes_cadastro_leads·[39m
    [31m       SET status = 'verificado',·[39m
    [31m           verificado_em = NOW(),·[39m
    [31m           verificado_por = $2·[39m
    [31m       WHERE id = $1`,·[39m
    [31m      [leadId, session.cpf]·[39m
    [31m    );···[39m

    [31m    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, status: 'verificado' });·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m9. LP route — mapeamento camelCase → snake_case ao encaminhar ao QWork › mapeia erro duplicata de CPF para mensagem legível[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    [31m * POST /api/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m

    [31m// ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────···[39m
    [31mfunction fieldErrors(·[39m
    [31m  issues: { path: PropertyKey[]; message: string }[],·[39m
    [31m): Record<string, string> {·[39m
    [31m  const errors: Record<string, string> = {};·[39m
    [31m  for (const issue of issues) {·[39m
    [31m    const key = String(issue.path[0] ?? \"form\");·[39m
    [31m    if (!errors[key]) errors[key] = issue.message;·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m  return errors;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m// ── Handler ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // Isola a falha de parse (ex.: body sem boundary multipart) como 400,·[39m

    [31m      // Bot detected — retorna 200 silencioso·[39m

    [31m    }···[39m

    [31m          try {·[39m

    [31m          }···[39m

    [31m          // Mapear erros de duplicação para mensagens amigáveis·[39m
    [31m          let userMessage = \"Erro ao processar cadastro. Tente novamente.\";·[39m
    [31m          let errorField: string | undefined;···[39m
    [31m          const isDuplicate =·[39m
    [31m            qworkError.code === \"DUPLICATE\" ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"duplicat\") ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"duplicate\") ||·[39m

    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"unico\") ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"unique\") ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"já existe\") ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"já possui um cadastro\") ||·[39m
    [31m            errorMsg.includes(\"em análise\");···[39m
    [31m          const dupeField =·[39m
    [31m            qworkError.field ??·[39m
    [31m            (errorMsg.includes(\"cpf\")·[39m
    [31m              ? \"cpf\"·[39m
    [31m              : errorMsg.includes(\"cnpj\")·[39m
    [31m                ? \"cnpj\"·[39m
    [31m                : errorMsg.includes(\"email\")·[39m
    [31m                  ? \"email\"·[39m
    [31m                  : undefined);···[39m
    [31m          if (isDuplicate && dupeField === \"cpf\") {·[39m
    [31m            userMessage = \"Este CPF já possui um cadastro em análise.\";·[39m
    [31m            errorField = \"cpf\";·[39m
    [31m          } else if (isDuplicate && dupeField === \"cnpj\") {·[39m
    [31m            userMessage = \"Este CNPJ já possui um cadastro em análise.\";·[39m
    [31m            errorField = \"cnpj\";·[39m
    [31m          } else if (isDuplicate && dupeField === \"email\") {·[39m
    [31m            userMessage = \"Este e-mail já possui um cadastro em análise.\";·[39m
    [31m            errorField = \"email\";·[39m
    [31m          } else if (isDuplicate) {·[39m
    [31m            userMessage = \"Cadastro duplicado. Verifique seus dados.\";·[39m
    [31m          }···[39m
    [31m          return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m            {·[39m
    [31m              errors: {·[39m
    [31m                form: userMessage,·[39m
    [31m                ...(errorField ? { [errorField]: userMessage } : {}),·[39m
    [31m              },·[39m
    [31m            },·[39m
    [31m            { status: 400 },·[39m
    [31m          );·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      } catch (fetchErr) {·[39m
    [31m        console.error(\"[REPRESENTANTE] QWork API unreachable:\", fetchErr);·[39m
    [31m        return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m          { errors: { form: \"Serviço temporariamente indisponível.\" } },·[39m
    [31m          { status: 503 },·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Disparar e-mails (aguardados — erros aparecem no terminal) ────────·[39m
    [31m    const adminPayload: AdminNotificationPayload = {·[39m
    [31m      tipoPessoa: tipoPessoa as \"PF\" | \"PJ\",·[39m
    [31m      nome: raw.nome,·[39m
    [31m      email: raw.email,·[39m
    [31m      telefone: raw.telefone,·[39m
    [31m      cpf: raw.cpf,·[39m
    [31m      cnpj: raw.cnpj,·[39m
    [31m      razaoSocial: raw.razaoSocial,·[39m
    [31m      cpfResponsavel: raw.cpfResponsavel,·[39m
    [31m      temDocumentos: hasFiles,·[39m
    [31m    };···[39m
    [31m    const emailResults = await Promise.allSettled([·[39m
    [31m      sendConfirmationEmail(raw.email, raw.nome, token),·[39m
    [31m      sendAdminNotification(adminPayload),·[39m
    [31m    ]);···[39m
    [31m    emailResults.forEach((result, i) => {·[39m
    [31m      const label =·[39m
    [31m        i === 0 ? \"confirmação (representante)\" : \"notificação (admin)\";·[39m
    [31m      if (result.status === \"rejected\") {·[39m
    [31m        console.error(·[39m
    [31m          `[REPRESENTANTE] Falha no email de ${label}:`,·[39m
    [31m          result.reason,·[39m
    [31m        );·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    });···[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true }, { status: 200 });·[39m
    [31m  } catch (err) {·[39m
    [31m    console.error(\"[REPRESENTANTE] Unexpected error:\", err);·[39m
    [31m    return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m      { errors: { form: \"Erro interno.\" } },·[39m
    [31m      { status: 500 },·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m}·[39m
    [31m"[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m9. LP route — mapeamento camelCase → snake_case ao encaminhar ao QWork › mapeia erro duplicata de email para mensagem legível[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    [31m * POST /api/representantes/cadastro·[39m
    [31m *·[39m
    [31m * Recebe FormData do formulário de cadastro de representantes.·[39m
    [31m * Valida campos, gera token de confirmação, dispara e-mails via Resend·[39m

    [31mimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";·[39m
    [31mimport crypto from \"node:crypto\";·[39m
    [31mimport {·[39m
    [31m  pessoaFisicaSchema,·[39m
    [31m  pessoaJuridicaSchema,·[39m
    [31m  validateFile,·[39m
    [31m} from \"@/lib/validators/representante\";·[39m

    [31m// ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────···[39m
    [31mfunction fieldErrors(·[39m
    [31m  issues: { path: PropertyKey[]; message: string }[],·[39m
    [31m): Record<string, string> {·[39m
    [31m  const errors: Record<string, string> = {};·[39m
    [31m  for (const issue of issues) {·[39m
    [31m    const key = String(issue.path[0] ?? \"form\");·[39m
    [31m    if (!errors[key]) errors[key] = issue.message;·[39m
    [31m  }·[39m
    [31m  return errors;·[39m
    [31m}···[39m
    [31m// ── Handler ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────···[39m
    [31mexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {·[39m
    [31m  try {·[39m
    [31m    // Isola a falha de parse (ex.: body sem boundary multipart) como 400,·[39m
    [31m    // evitando que vire Unexpected error 500.·[39m
    [31m    let formData: FormData;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      formData = await req.formData();·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        { errors: { form: \"Formato de envio inválido. Tente novamente.\" } },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 },·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Honeypot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    const honeypot = formData.get(\"website\") as string | null;·[39m
    [31m    if (honeypot) {·[39m
    [31m      // Bot detected — retorna 200 silencioso·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true }, { status: 200 });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Extrair campos de texto ───────────────────────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    const tipoPessoa = formData.get(\"tipoPessoa\") as string;·[39m
    [31m    const nome = formData.get(\"nome\") as string;·[39m
    [31m    const email = formData.get(\"email\") as string;·[39m
    [31m    const telefone = formData.get(\"telefone\") as string;···[39m
    [31m    const raw: Record<string, string> = {·[39m
    [31m      tipoPessoa,·[39m
    [31m      nome: nome ?? \"\",·[39m
    [31m      email: email ?? \"\",·[39m
    [31m      telefone: telefone ?? \"\",·[39m
    [31m      website: \"\",·[39m
    [31m    };···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === \"PF\") {·[39m
    [31m      raw.cpf = (formData.get(\"cpf\") as string) ?? \"\";·[39m
    [31m    } else if (tipoPessoa === \"PJ\") {·[39m
    [31m      raw.razaoSocial = (formData.get(\"razaoSocial\") as string) ?? \"\";·[39m
    [31m      raw.cnpj = (formData.get(\"cnpj\") as string) ?? \"\";·[39m
    [31m      raw.cpfResponsavel = (formData.get(\"cpfResponsavel\") as string) ?? \"\";·[39m

    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        { errors: { tipoPessoa: \"Tipo de pessoa inválido.\" } },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 },·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Validação Zod ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    const schema =·[39m
    [31m      tipoPessoa === \"PF\" ? pessoaFisicaSchema : pessoaJuridicaSchema;·[39m
    [31m    const result = schema.safeParse(raw);···[39m
    [31m    if (!result.success) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m        { errors: fieldErrors(result.error.issues) },·[39m
    [31m        { status: 400 },·[39m
    [31m      );·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Validar arquivos ──────────────────────────────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    const fileErrors: Record<string, string> = {};·[39m
    [31m    let hasFiles = false;···[39m
    [31m    if (tipoPessoa === \"PF\") {·[39m
    [31m      const docCpf = formData.get(\"documentoCpf\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m      if (docCpf && docCpf.size > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        const v = validateFile(docCpf);·[39m
    [31m        if (!v.valid) fileErrors.documentoCpf = v.error;·[39m
    [31m        else hasFiles = true;·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      const docCnpj = formData.get(\"documentoCnpj\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m      const docCpfResp = formData.get(\"documentoCpfResponsavel\") as File | null;···[39m
    [31m      if (docCnpj && docCnpj.size > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        const v = validateFile(docCnpj);·[39m
    [31m        if (!v.valid) fileErrors.documentoCnpj = v.error;·[39m
    [31m        else hasFiles = true;·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      if (docCpfResp && docCpfResp.size > 0) {·[39m
    [31m        const v = validateFile(docCpfResp);·[39m
    [31m        if (!v.valid) fileErrors.documentoCpfResponsavel = v.error;·[39m
    [31m        else hasFiles = true;·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    if (Object.keys(fileErrors).length > 0) {·[39m
    [31m      return NextResponse.json({ errors: fileErrors }, { status: 400 });·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Upload Backblaze (staging/prod — VERCEL=1) ────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    // Em DEV o backend QWork faz o upload; no Vercel a LP sobe diretamente.·[39m
    [31m    // Se credenciais não existem — fallback para delegação ao QWork.·[39m
    [31m    const isVercel = process.env.VERCEL === \"1\";·[39m
    [31m    const backblazeUploads: Record<string, DocUploadResult> = {};·[39m
    [31m    let backblazeCredentialsMissing = false;···[39m
    [31m    if (isVercel) {·[39m
    [31m      const { uploadDocumentoRepresentante } =·[39m
    [31m        await import(\"@/lib/storage/representante-storage\");···[39m
    [31m      // Identificador somente dígitos (CPF para PF, CNPJ para PJ)·[39m
    [31m      const identificador =·[39m
    [31m        tipoPessoa === \"PF\"·[39m
    [31m          ? (raw.cpf ?? \"\").replace(/\\D/g, \"\")·[39m
    [31m          : (raw.cnpj ?? \"\").replace(/\\D/g, \"\");···[39m
    [31m      try {·[39m
    [31m        if (tipoPessoa === \"PF\") {·[39m
    [31m          const docCpf = formData.get(\"documentoCpf\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m          if (docCpf && docCpf.size > 0) {·[39m
    [31m            console.log(·[39m
    [31m              `[REPRESENTANTE] Upload PF: documentoCpf (${docCpf.size} bytes, ${docCpf.type})`,·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m

    [31m              docCpf,·[39m
    [31m              \"cpf\",·[39m
    [31m              identificador,·[39m
    [31m              \"PF\",·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m          }·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          const docCnpj = formData.get(\"documentoCnpj\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m          const docCpfResp = formData.get(·[39m
    [31m            \"documentoCpfResponsavel\",·[39m

    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m            backblazeUploads.cnpj = await uploadDocumentoRepresentante(·[39m
    [31m              docCnpj,·[39m
    [31m              \"cnpj\",·[39m
    [31m              identificador,·[39m
    [31m              \"PJ\",·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m          }·[39m
    [31m          if (docCpfResp && docCpfResp.size > 0) {·[39m
    [31m            console.log(·[39m
    [31m              `[REPRESENTANTE] Upload PJ: documentoCpfResponsavel (${docCpfResp.size} bytes, ${docCpfResp.type})`,·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m            backblazeUploads.cpf_responsavel =·[39m
    [31m              await uploadDocumentoRepresentante(·[39m
    [31m                docCpfResp,·[39m
    [31m                \"cpf_responsavel\",·[39m
    [31m                identificador,·[39m

    [31m              );·[39m

    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      } catch (uploadErr) {·[39m
    [31m        const errMsg =·[39m

    [31m        // Se credenciais não configuradas — fallback para DEV mode (repassa ao QWork)·[39m
    [31m        if (·[39m
    [31m          (uploadErr as any)?.code === \"BACKBLAZE_CREDENTIALS_MISSING\" ||·[39m
    [31m          errMsg.includes(\"Credenciais não configuradas\")·[39m

    [31m          );·[39m
    [31m          backblazeCredentialsMissing = true;·[39m
    [31m          // Continuar normalmente — forwardData repassará os arquivos ao QWork·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          // Outros erros — logar com detalhes e rejeitar·[39m

    [31m            keyId: process.env.BACKBLAZE_REP_KEY_ID·[39m
    [31m              ? `${process.env.BACKBLAZE_REP_KEY_ID.slice(0, 10)}...`·[39m
    [31m              : process.env.BACKBLAZE_KEY_ID·[39m
    [31m                ? `${process.env.BACKBLAZE_KEY_ID.slice(0, 10)}... (fallback BACKBLAZE_KEY_ID)`·[39m
    [31m                : \"(nenhuma credencial encontrada)\",·[39m
    [31m            endpoint: process.env.BACKBLAZE_ENDPOINT || \"(default)\",·[39m
    [31m          });·[39m
    [31m          return NextResponse.json(·[39m
    [31m            { errors: { form: \"Erro ao enviar documentos. Tente novamente.\" } },·[39m
    [31m            { status: 503 },·[39m
    [31m          );·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // ── Gerar token ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────·[39m
    [31m    const token = crypto.randomUUID();···[39m
    [31m    // ── Encaminhar ao backend QWork ───────────────────────────────────────·[39m

    [31m    const skipQWork = process.env.QWORK_API_SKIP === \"true\";·[39m

    [31m    if (skipQWork) {·[39m

    [31m        \"[REPRESENTANTE][DEV] QWORK_API_SKIP=true — encaminhamento ao QWork ignorado.\",·[39m

    [31m      forwardData.append(\"tipo_pessoa\", (raw.tipoPessoa ?? \"\").toLowerCase());·[39m

    [31m      forwardData.append(\"website\", \"\"); // honeypot vazio···[39m
    [31m      // Campos PF·[39m
    [31m      if (raw.tipoPessoa === \"PF\") {·[39m
    [31m        forwardData.append(\"cpf\", raw.cpf ?? \"\");·[39m

    [31m          // Staging/prod com credenciais: arquivos já foram enviados ao Backblaze; passa as chaves·[39m

    [31m          forwardData.append(\"backblaze_url_cpf\", backblazeUploads.cpf.url);·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          // DEV ou fallback (credenciais ausentes): repassa o arquivo para o QWork fazer o upload·[39m
    [31m          const docCpf = formData.get(\"documentoCpf\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m          if (docCpf && docCpf.size > 0)·[39m
    [31m            forwardData.append(\"documento_cpf\", docCpf);·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      }···[39m
    [31m      // Campos PJ·[39m
    [31m      if (raw.tipoPessoa === \"PJ\") {·[39m
    [31m        forwardData.append(\"cnpj\", raw.cnpj ?? \"\");·[39m
    [31m        forwardData.append(\"razao_social\", raw.razaoSocial ?? \"\");·[39m
    [31m        forwardData.append(\"cpf_responsavel\", raw.cpfResponsavel ?? \"\");·[39m
    [31m        if (isVercel && !backblazeCredentialsMissing) {·[39m
    [31m          // Staging/prod com credenciais: passa as chaves Backblaze·[39m
    [31m          if (backblazeUploads.cnpj) {·[39m
    [31m            forwardData.append(\"backblaze_key_cnpj\", backblazeUploads.cnpj.key);·[39m
    [31m            forwardData.append(\"backblaze_url_cnpj\", backblazeUploads.cnpj.url);·[39m
    [31m          }·[39m
    [31m          if (backblazeUploads.cpf_responsavel) {·[39m
    [31m            forwardData.append(·[39m
    [31m              \"backblaze_key_cpf_responsavel\",·[39m
    [31m              backblazeUploads.cpf_responsavel.key,·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m            forwardData.append(·[39m
    [31m              \"backblaze_url_cpf_responsavel\",·[39m
    [31m              backblazeUploads.cpf_responsavel.url,·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m          }·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          // DEV ou fallback (credenciais ausentes): repassa os arquivos para o QWork fazer o upload·[39m
    [31m          const docCnpj = formData.get(\"documentoCnpj\") as File | null;·[39m
    [31m          const docCpfResp = formData.get(·[39m
    [31m            \"documentoCpfResponsavel\",·[39m
    [31m          ) as File | null;·[39m

[1m[31m  [1m● [22m[1m7. Layout portal — novas funcionalidades › deve exibir badge quando dados_bancarios_status !== confirmado[39m[22m

    [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoMatch[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m

    Expected pattern: [32m/mostrarBadgeDados/[39m
    Received string:  [31m"'use client';···[39m
    [31mimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';·[39m
    [31mimport { useRouter, usePathname } from 'next/navigation';·[39m
    [31mimport Link from 'next/link';·[39m
    [31mimport { RepContext, type RepresentanteSession } from './rep-context';·[39m
    [31mimport ModalTermosRepresentante from '@/components/modals/ModalTermosRepresentante';···[39m
    [31mconst STATUS_BADGE: Record<string, string> = {·[39m
    [31m  ativo: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',·[39m
    [31m  apto: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',·[39m
    [31m  apto_pendente: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700',·[39m
    [31m  apto_bloqueado: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',·[39m
    [31m  suspenso: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',·[39m
    [31m  desativado: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',·[39m
    [31m};···[39m
    [31mexport default function PortalLayout({·[39m
    [31m  children,·[39m
    [31m}: {·[39m
    [31m  children: React.ReactNode;·[39m
    [31m}) {·[39m
    [31m  const router = useRouter();·[39m
    [31m  const pathname = usePathname();·[39m
    [31m  const [session, setSession] = useState<RepresentanteSession | null>(null);·[39m
    [31m  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);·[39m
    [31m  const [copiado, setCopiado] = useState(false);···[39m
    [31m  const carregarSessao = useCallback(async () => {·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const res = await fetch('/api/representante/me');·[39m
    [31m      if (!res.ok) {·[39m
    [31m        router.push('/login');·[39m
    [31m        return;·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m      const data = await res.json();·[39m
    [31m      setSession(data.representante);·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      router.push('/login');·[39m
    [31m    } finally {·[39m
    [31m      setLoading(false);·[39m
    [31m    }·[39m
    [31m  }, [router]);···[39m
    [31m  useEffect(() => {·[39m
    [31m    carregarSessao();·[39m
    [31m  }, [carregarSessao]);···[39m
    [31m  const handleLogout = async () => {·[39m
    [31m    await fetch('/api/representante/logout', { method: 'POST' });·[39m
    [31m    router.push('/login');·[39m
    [31m  };···[39m
    [31m  const handleVoltar = () => {·[39m
    [31m    // Tenta navegar para a página anterior;·[39m
    [31m    // se não houver histórico, cai no dashboard·[39m
    [31m    if (window.history.length > 1) {·[39m
    [31m      router.back();·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      router.push('/representante/dashboard');·[39m
    [31m    }·[39m
    [31m  };···[39m
    [31m  const handleCopiarCodigo = async () => {·[39m
    [31m    if (!session?.codigo) return;·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(session.codigo);·[39m
    [31m      setCopiado(true);·[39m
    [31m      setTimeout(() => setCopiado(false), 2000);·[39m
    [31m    } catch {·[39m
    [31m      // Fallback para navegadores antigos·[39m
    [31m      const input = document.createElement('input');·[39m
    [31m      input.value = session.codigo;·[39m
    [31m      document.body.appendChild(input);·[39m
    [31m      input.select();·[39m
    [31m      document.execCommand('copy');·[39m
    [31m      document.body.removeChild(input);·[39m
    [31m      setCopiado(true);·[39m
    [31m      setTimeout(() => setCopiado(false), 2000);·[39m
    [31m    }·[39m
    [31m  };···[39m
    [31m  const NAV_ITEMS = [·[39m
    [31m    { href: '/representante/dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', badge: false },·[39m
    [31m    { href: '/representante/metricas', label: 'Métricas', badge: false },·[39m
    [31m    { href: '/representante/equipe', label: 'Minha Equipe', badge: false },·[39m
    [31m    { href: '/representante/dados', label: 'Dados', badge: false },·[39m
    [31m  ];···[39m
    [31m  if (loading) {·[39m
    [31m    return (·[39m
    [31m      <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center\">·[39m
    [31m        <div className=\"animate-spin h-8 w-8 rounded-full border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent\" />·[39m
    [31m      </div>·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  // Gate de primeiro acesso: exibe modal bloqueante até todos os aceites serem concluídos·[39m
    [31m  if (session && !session.aceite_politica_privacidade) {·[39m
    [31m    return (·[39m
    [31m      <ModalTermosRepresentante·[39m
    [31m        onConcluir={() => {·[39m
    [31m          // Recarrega a sessão para que o layout perceba que os aceites foram concluídos·[39m
    [31m          carregarSessao();·[39m
    [31m        }}·[39m
    [31m      />·[39m
    [31m    );·[39m
    [31m  }···[39m
    [31m  return (·[39m
    [31m    <RepContext.Provider value={{ session }}>·[39m
    [31m      <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50\">·[39m
    [31m        {/* Top navigation */}·[39m
    [31m        <header className=\"bg-white border-b shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-30\">·[39m
    [31m          <div className=\"max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 flex items-center justify-between h-14\">·[39m
    [31m            {/* Botão Voltar + nav links */}·[39m
    [31m            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">·[39m
    [31m              <button·[39m
    [31m                onClick={handleVoltar}·[39m
    [31m                className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors shrink-0\"·[39m
    [31m                aria-label=\"Voltar\"·[39m
    [31m              >·[39m
    [31m                <span className=\"text-base leading-none\">←</span>·[39m
    [31m                <span className=\"hidden sm:inline\">Voltar</span>·[39m
    [31m              </button>·[39m
    [31m              <nav className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-0.5\">·[39m
    [31m                {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {·[39m
    [31m                  const isActive = pathname === item.href;·[39m
    [31m                  return (·[39m
    [31m                    <Link·[39m
    [31m                      key={item.href}·[39m
    [31m                      href={item.href}·[39m
    [31m                      className={`relative px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${·[39m
    [31m                        isActive·[39m
    [31m                          ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700'·[39m
    [31m                          : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900'·[39m
    [31m                      }`}·[39m
    [31m                    >·[39m
    [31m                      {item.label}·[39m
    [31m                      {item.badge && (·[39m
    [31m                        <span className=\"absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500\" />·[39m
    [31m                      )}·[39m
    [31m                    </Link>·[39m
    [31m                  );·[39m
    [31m                })}·[39m
    [31m              </nav>·[39m
    [31m            </div>···[39m
    [31m            {/* Rep info + logout */}·[39m
    [31m            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">·[39m
    [31m              {session && (·[39m
    [31m                <>·[39m
    [31m                  <div className=\"text-right hidden md:block\">·[39m
    [31m                    <p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 leading-tight\">·[39m
    [31m                      {session.nome}·[39m
    [31m                    </p>·[39m
    [31m                    <div className=\"flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 mt-0.5\">·[39m
    [31m                      <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono leading-tight\">·[39m
    [31m                        {session.codigo}·[39m
    [31m                      </p>·[39m
    [31m                      <button·[39m
    [31m                        onClick={handleCopiarCodigo}·[39m
    [31m                        title=\"Copiar código\"·[39m

    [31m                      >·[39m
    [31m                        {copiado ? '✅' : '📋'}·[39m
    [31m                      </button>·[39m
    [31m                    </div>·[39m
    [31m                  </div>·[39m
    [31m                  <span·[39m
    [31m                    className={`hidden sm:inline px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_BADGE[session.status] ?? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'}`}·[39m
    [31m                  >·[39m
    [31m                    {session.status.replace(/_/g, ' ').toUpperCase()}·[39m

    [31m          setHasStarted(data.respostas.length > 0);···[39m
    [31m          // Sincronizar status da avaliação: se já houver respostas e o status ainda for 'iniciada', atualizar para 'em_andamento'·[39m
    [31m          try {·[39m
    [31m            if (·[39m
    [31m              data.respostas.length > 0 &&·[39m
    [31m              avaliacaoAtual &&·[39m
    [31m              avaliacaoAtual.status === 'iniciada'·[39m
    [31m            ) {·[39m
    [31m              fetch('/api/avaliacao/status', {·[39m
    [31m                method: 'PATCH',·[39m
    [31m                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },·[39m
    [31m                body: JSON.stringify({·[39m
    [31m                  status: 'em_andamento',·[39m
    [31m                  avaliacaoId: avaliacaoIdToUse,·[39m
    [31m                }),·[39m
    [31m              }).catch((err) =>·[39m
    [31m                console.warn(·[39m
    [31m                  'Erro ao sincronizar status para em_andamento:',·[39m
    [31m                  err·[39m
    [31m                )·[39m
    [31m              );·[39m
    [31m            }·[39m
    [31m          } catch (err) {·[39m
    [31m            console.warn(·[39m
    [31m              'Erro na verificação de sincronização de status:',·[39m
    [31m              err·[39m
    [31m            );·[39m
    [31m          }···[39m
    [31m          // Encontrar primeira questão não respondida ou ir para o final·[39m
    [31m          const primeiraIndex = todasQuestoesCarregadas.findIndex(·[39m
    [31m            (q) => !map[q.itemId]·[39m
    [31m          );·[39m
    [31m          setCurrentIndex(·[39m
    [31m            primeiraIndex === -1·[39m
    [31m              ? todasQuestoesCarregadas.length - 1·[39m
    [31m              : primeiraIndex·[39m
    [31m          );·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      } catch (err) {·[39m
    [31m        console.error('Erro ao carregar avaliação', err);·[39m
    [31m      } finally {·[39m
    [31m        setIsLoading(false);·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    }·[39m
    [31m    carregar();·[39m
    [31m  }, []);···[39m
    [31m  const questaoAtual = todasQuestoes[currentIndex];···[39m
    [31m  async function responder(valor: number) {·[39m
    [31m    if (!avaliacaoId || !questaoAtual || isSaving) return;···[39m
    [31m    setIsSaving(true);···[39m
    [31m    // Detectar se é a última questão (Q37)·[39m
    [31m    const proximoIndex = currentIndex + 1;·[39m
    [31m    const isUltimaQuestao = proximoIndex >= todasQuestoes.length;···[39m
    [31m    // Registrar resposta no estado local imediatamente (optimistic)·[39m
    [31m    setRespostas((prev) => ({ ...prev, [questaoAtual.itemId]: valor }));···[39m
    [31m    // Para perguntas intermediárias: aguardar 220ms para que o React renderize·[39m
    [31m    // a opção selecionada antes de avançar para a próxima questão.·[39m
    [31m    // setCurrentIndex e setRespostas no mesmo ciclo seriam batched e o usuário·[39m
    [31m    // nunca veria o botão preenchido.·[39m
    [31m    if (!isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m      setTimeout(() => {·[39m
    [31m        setCurrentIndex(proximoIndex);·[39m
    [31m        setIsSaving(false);·[39m
    [31m      }, 400);·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      // Se é a última questão, mostrar modal IMEDIATAMENTE·[39m
    [31m      setShowCompletionModal(true);·[39m
    [31m      setCompletionStatus('processing');·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Atualizar status para em_andamento (background, sem bloquear)·[39m
    [31m    if (!hasStarted) {·[39m
    [31m      setHasStarted(true);·[39m
    [31m      fetch('/api/avaliacao/status', {·[39m
    [31m        method: 'PATCH',·[39m
    [31m        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },·[39m
    [31m        body: JSON.stringify({ status: 'em_andamento', avaliacaoId }),·[39m
    [31m      }).catch((err) => console.warn('Erro ao atualizar status:', err));·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Salvar resposta em background·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const saveResponse = await fetch('/api/avaliacao/respostas', {·[39m
    [31m        method: 'POST',·[39m
    [31m        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },·[39m
    [31m        body: JSON.stringify({·[39m
    [31m          avaliacaoId,·[39m
    [31m          grupo: questaoAtual.grupoId,·[39m
    [31m          item: questaoAtual.itemId,·[39m
    [31m          valor,·[39m
    [31m        }),·[39m
    [31m      });···[39m
    [31m      if (saveResponse.ok) {·[39m
    [31m        const data = await saveResponse.json();···[39m
    [31m        // Verificar se a avaliação foi concluída automaticamente (37 respostas)·[39m
    [31m        if (data.completed) {·[39m
    [31m          console.log('✅ Avaliação concluída automaticamente!');·[39m
    [31m          // Mudar estado do modal para sucesso·[39m
    [31m          setCompletionStatus('success');·[39m
    [31m          // Aguardar 1.5s mostrando sucesso antes de redirecionar·[39m
    [31m          setTimeout(() => {·[39m
    [31m            window.location.href = `/avaliacao/concluida?avaliacao_id=${avaliacaoId}`;·[39m
    [31m          }, 1500);·[39m
    [31m          return;·[39m
    [31m        }···[39m
    [31m        if (isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m          setIsFinished(true);·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      } else {·[39m
    [31m        // Erro ao salvar — reverter optimistic update·[39m
    [31m        console.error('Erro ao salvar resposta:', await saveResponse.text());·[39m
    [31m        setRespostas((prev) => {·[39m
    [31m          const next = { ...prev };·[39m
    [31m          delete next[questaoAtual.itemId];·[39m
    [31m          return next;·[39m
    [31m        });·[39m
    [31m        if (!isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m          setCurrentIndex(currentIndex);·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          setShowCompletionModal(false);·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m        alert('Erro ao salvar resposta. Tente novamente.');·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } catch (err) {·[39m
    [31m      console.warn('Erro de rede ao salvar resposta:', err);·[39m
    [31m      // Não reverter para perguntas intermediárias (tolerância a falhas de rede)·[39m
    [31m      if (isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m        setShowCompletionModal(false);·[39m
    [31m        alert('Erro de conexão. Tente novamente.');·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m

    [31m      setIsSaving(false);·[39m

    [31m          </p>·[39m

    [31m  async function responder(valor: number) {·[39m
    [31m    if (!avaliacaoId || !questaoAtual || isSaving) return;···[39m
    [31m    setIsSaving(true);···[39m
    [31m    // Detectar se é a última questão (Q37)·[39m
    [31m    const proximoIndex = currentIndex + 1;·[39m
    [31m    const isUltimaQuestao = proximoIndex >= todasQuestoes.length;···[39m
    [31m    // Registrar resposta no estado local imediatamente (optimistic)·[39m
    [31m    setRespostas((prev) => ({ ...prev, [questaoAtual.itemId]: valor }));···[39m
    [31m    // Para perguntas intermediárias: aguardar 220ms para que o React renderize·[39m
    [31m    // a opção selecionada antes de avançar para a próxima questão.·[39m
    [31m    // setCurrentIndex e setRespostas no mesmo ciclo seriam batched e o usuário·[39m
    [31m    // nunca veria o botão preenchido.·[39m

    [31m      setTimeout(() => {·[39m
    [31m        setCurrentIndex(proximoIndex);·[39m
    [31m        setIsSaving(false);·[39m
    [31m      }, 400);·[39m
    [31m    } else {·[39m
    [31m      // Se é a última questão, mostrar modal IMEDIATAMENTE·[39m
    [31m      setShowCompletionModal(true);·[39m
    [31m      setCompletionStatus('processing');·[39m
    [31m    }···[39m
    [31m    // Atualizar status para em_andamento (background, sem bloquear)·[39m

    [31m      fetch('/api/avaliacao/status', {·[39m

    [31m      }).catch((err) => console.warn('Erro ao atualizar status:', err));·[39m

    [31m    // Salvar resposta em background·[39m
    [31m    try {·[39m
    [31m      const saveResponse = await fetch('/api/avaliacao/respostas', {·[39m
    [31m        method: 'POST',·[39m
    [31m        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },·[39m
    [31m        body: JSON.stringify({·[39m
    [31m          avaliacaoId,·[39m
    [31m          grupo: questaoAtual.grupoId,·[39m
    [31m          item: questaoAtual.itemId,·[39m
    [31m          valor,·[39m
    [31m        }),·[39m
    [31m      });···[39m
    [31m      if (saveResponse.ok) {·[39m
    [31m        const data = await saveResponse.json();···[39m

    [31m        if (data.completed) {·[39m

    [31m          // Mudar estado do modal para sucesso·[39m
    [31m          setCompletionStatus('success');·[39m
    [31m          // Aguardar 1.5s mostrando sucesso antes de redirecionar·[39m
    [31m          setTimeout(() => {·[39m
    [31m            window.location.href = `/avaliacao/concluida?avaliacao_id=${avaliacaoId}`;·[39m
    [31m          }, 1500);·[39m
    [31m          return;·[39m
    [31m        }···[39m
    [31m        if (isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m          setIsFinished(true);·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m      } else {·[39m
    [31m        // Erro ao salvar — reverter optimistic update·[39m
    [31m        console.error('Erro ao salvar resposta:', await saveResponse.text());·[39m

    [31m          const next = { ...prev };·[39m
    [31m          delete next[questaoAtual.itemId];·[39m
    [31m          return next;·[39m
    [31m        });·[39m
    [31m        if (!isUltimaQuestao) {·[39m
    [31m          setCurrentIndex(currentIndex);·[39m
    [31m        } else {·[39m
    [31m          setShowCompletionModal(false);·[39m
    [31m        }·[39m
    [31m        alert('Erro ao salvar resposta. Tente novamente.');·[39m
    [31m      }·[39m
    [31m    } catch (err) {·[39m
    [31m      console.warn('Erro de rede ao salvar resposta:', err);·[39m
